methods.name: post_bounty
methods.desc:
Creator posts a bounty and funds the escrow.
Must be called with a grouped payment transaction.

methods.name: accept_bounty
methods.desc: Worker accepts an open bounty. Cannot self-accept.

methods.name: withdraw_acceptance
methods.desc:
Contributor leaves after accepting but before submitting work.
Bounty returns to OPEN; escrow stays funded; another worker may accept.

methods.name: creator_cancel_bounty
methods.desc:
Creator closes the bounty and recovers escrow before any work is submitted.
Allowed only in OPEN or ACCEPTED. If a worker had accepted, they are penalized (more severely if the bounty deadline has passed without a submission).

methods.name: submit_work
methods.desc:
Worker submits work plus a frozen evidence hash of the submitted artifact.
Note: Global state is world-readable. For confidentiality, store only a hash or ciphertext metadata on-chain; keep plaintext or decryption keys off-chain.

methods.name: approve_work
methods.desc: Creator approves the submitted work — triggers payout to contributor.

methods.name: reject_work
methods.desc: Creator rejects the work. Starts 5-min dispute window (5 days in prod).

methods.name: raise_dispute
methods.desc: Contributor disputes rejection. Must be within dispute window.

methods.name: opt_out
methods.desc: Contributor forfeits — funds returned to creator.

methods.name: reopen_after_rejection
methods.desc:
Creator re-lists the bounty for a new contributor after a rejection.
Only after the dispute window has ended (contributor did not dispute in time), and while the original bounty deadline has not passed. Escrow stays in the app; reward_amount is unchanged. Clears contributor and submission fields.

methods.name: auto_release_after_silence
methods.desc:
Anti-ghosting: if creator is silent for 5 min (5 days in prod),
anyone can call this to release funds to contributor.

methods.name: oracle_verdict
methods.desc:
Automated oracle verdict for code bounties.
result = "PASS" → pay contributor | "FAIL" → refund creator

methods.name: get_credit_score
methods.desc: Returns the contributor's on-chain reputation score.

methods.name: get_bounty_info
methods.desc: Returns full bounty details as a named tuple.

methods.name: get_evidence_info
methods.desc: Returns stored evidence hashes and oracle verdict metadata.
